project_type: Vite + React 18 + TypeScript single-page app (luxury fashion portfolio)
build_system: Vite 5 with TypeScript type-checking (tsc -b) then vite build
test_framework: No test framework installed - validation is build-only (tsc -b && vite build)
verification_instructions: 1. Run npx tsc -b to confirm no TypeScript errors. 2. Run npx vite build to confirm production build succeeds. 3. Visually confirm the output bundle is reasonable size.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access available. No Docker needed for this project.
contribution_requirements: Photography from Pexels (royalty-free). Lucide React for icons. Tailwind CSS for styling. Framer Motion for animations. All brand changes must propagate to: index.html (title, meta, OG, schema.org), manifest.webmanifest, favicon.svg, Logo.tsx, Navbar.tsx, Footer.tsx, Chatbot.tsx (Joy intro), whatsapp.ts messages.
key_patterns: Components use Framer Motion for scroll animations. Images use pexels() helper from src/utils/images.ts. WhatsApp deep-linking via buildWhatsAppUrl(). Admin-editable content uses EditableText/EditableImage components. Tailwind custom palette: cream/ink/bronze/wine. CSS utility classes in index.css: .container-luxe, .btn-primary, .btn-ghost, .eyebrow, .display-1/2/3, .gold-divider. The site sections flow: Navbar > Hero > Marquee > Collections > PressStrip > About > Services > StyleQuiz > Testimonials > Faq > Newsletter > Contact > Footer.
directory_structure: Root: index.html, package.json, tailwind.config.js, vite.config.ts. public/: favicon.svg, manifest.webmanifest. src/: App.tsx (main), components/ (all UI sections), context/ (state providers), data/designs.ts (static catalog), utils/ (helpers), services/ (Supabase + Gemini), lib/ (auth).
